headline: Anthropic moved Claude into Slack with a scoped agent identity while transformer internals and agentic economy concepts dominated the month's rotation.
body: Anthropic introduced Claude Tag, letting users invoke Claude inside Slack threads with persistent context, and paired it with an agent identity model that gives Claude its own scoped, auditable identity for multiplayer sessions rather than impersonating users. Transformer internals broke out alongside this, with feed-forward networks, text embeddings, and residual connections leading the rotation off a visual GPT walkthrough. Google DeepMind framed an agentic economy of millions of autonomous agents transacting and negotiating, raising automation bias and security concerns. A new cluster of resilience techniques, data backup, immutability, disaster recovery, and ransomware protection, entered as new entrants.

cited_items.title: Agent identity: A new access model for Claude Tag
Tag Claude in, right where you already work
When millions of AI agents meet
